productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Magenta Top
description: Composition Magenta boat neck top made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves and has graphic print on the front with stitch detailing Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash, dry and iron inside out Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergent Do not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry clean Dry flat in shade Cool iron, but do not iron on print or embroidery Flaunt your wild side in style with this top from united colors of benetton.
